metaDescription: TokoHPL's privacy policy and customer data protection practices.
heading: Privacy Policy
intro: TokoHPL (tokohpl.com), operated by CV. Varindo Forma Hutama, is committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of every customer. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard the information you provide to us.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.intro: When you place an order on tokohpl.com, we collect the following information:
items: Shipping address (province, city, full address, postal code)
Any delivery notes you choose to provide
collect.outro: We do not collect payment information such as your credit card or bank account number. Payments are made via direct bank transfer.

use.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use.intro: The information you provide is used solely to:
items: Arrange delivery of products to your specified address
Contact you via WhatsApp or email regarding your order status
use.outro: We do not use your data for third-party marketing purposes or sell your data to other parties.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage
storage.body: Order data is stored locally on your device via browser storage (localStorage) and in our internal systems for transaction record-keeping. This data is not stored on third-party servers without your knowledge.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing Information with Third Parties
sharing.intro: We only share the information necessary with:
items: Shipping logistics partners, solely to process delivery of your order
Authorities, where required by applicable law in Indonesia

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.body: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse. Communication via WhatsApp is protected by end-to-end encryption.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
items: Request access to the personal data we hold about you
Request deletion of your personal data from our systems
rights.outro: To make such a request, please contact us by email at <email>tokohpl.admin@gmail.com</email>.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.body: This website uses browser local storage (localStorage) to save your shopping cart data and preferences during your session. This data is stored on your device and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Significant changes will be reflected on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of our services after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
